import pytest
from source import pascal

def test_pascal_rows_have_correct_lengths():
    result = pascal(3)
    expected_lengths = [1, 2, 3]
    for i, row in enumerate(result):
        assert len(row) == expected_lengths[i], f"Row {i} should have length {expected_lengths[i]}, but got length {len(row)}"
